description: Fix security vulnerabilities and upgrade QuantDrive to use real S3 storage. Address the 5 high audit vulns (form-data CRLF, vite server.fs.deny bypass) and replace the local-filesystem storage in quantdrive with the existing @quant/storage S3 client.
steps: 1. Fix form-data CRLF vulnerability: Add pnpm override in root package.json for form-data >=4.0.6 (already has overrides section for vite, postcss, etc). The vuln path is apps__quantcalendar>jsdom>form-data and packages__notifications>firebase-admin>...>form-data.
2. Fix vite server.fs.deny bypass: Update the existing vite override in root package.json from ^6.4.2 to ^6.4.3 or higher.
3. Run pnpm install to update lockfile with new overrides.

4. Rewrite apps/quantdrive/backend/services/storage.service.ts to use @quant/storage StorageClient (S3-compatible) instead of local filesystem. Import StorageClient from '@quant/storage', read config from env vars (S3_ENDPOINT, S3_BUCKET, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, S3_REGION). Keep a local-filesystem fallback for development when S3 env vars are not set.

5. Update apps/quantdrive/backend/routes/upload.ts to properly handle multipart file uploads using @fastify/multipart instead of the placeholder Buffer.from('placeholder'). Parse the multipart stream, pass real file buffer to storage service.
6. Add @fastify/multipart dependency to the quantdrive app's package.json if not present.
7. Run pnpm audit to verify vulns are fixed. Run typecheck and tests for affected packages.
8. Verify: pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/quantdrive && pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/quantdrive && pnpm audit
acceptance_criteria: QuantDrive storage service uses @quant/storage S3 client with proper env-var config
Upload route handles real multipart file uploads (not placeholder Buffer)
Local filesystem fallback works when S3 env vars are not configured
verification: pnpm audit --audit-level=high 2>&1 | grep -c 'high' should be 0 or show only acceptable items
findings: All 5 high vulnerabilities resolved (form-data CRLF injection via override >=4.0.6, vite server.fs.deny bypass via override >=6.4.3). pnpm audit now shows 0 high/critical. QuantDrive storage uses @quant/storage S3 client with fallback to local FS. Upload route uses @fastify/multipart for real file handling. All 103 tests pass, typecheck clean.
